imo.description: International Mathematical Olympiad. Official results by country and year.

rmm.description: Romanian Master of Mathematics — elite international olympiad held annually in Bucharest.

egmo.description: European Girls Mathematical Olympiad. International olympiad for female students.

amo.description: USA Mathematical Olympiad. Top-tier national olympiad for high school students.

jmo.description: USA Junior Mathematical Olympiad. National olympiad for students in grade 10 or below.

hmmt-feb.description: February Harvard-MIT Mathematics Tournament. Individual scores from Algebra, Geometry, and Combinatorics rounds. Difficulty: mid-AIME to olympiad. Students may not attend both November and February in the same school year.

hmmt-nov.description: November Harvard-MIT Mathematics Tournament. Individual scores from General and Theme rounds. Difficulty: mid-AMC to upper-AIME. Students may not attend both November and February in the same school year.

hmmt-nov-general.description: General round subject test at November HMMT.

hmmt-nov-theme.description: Theme round subject test at November HMMT.

hmmt-feb-algebra-number-theory.contest_name_long: Algebra and Number Theory round at February HMMT
hmmt-feb-algebra-number-theory.description: Algebra and Number Theory subject test at February HMMT.

hmmt-feb-geometry.contest_name_long: Geometry subject test at February HMMT

hmmt-feb-combo.description: Combinatorics subject test at February HMMT.

hmic.description: HMMT Invitational Competition. Annual online invitational with individual rounds. Difficulty: olympiad level.

pumac.contest_name_long: Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division A
pumac.description: Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division A. Annual team and individual contest.

pumac-b.contest_name_long: Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division B
pumac-b.description: Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division B. Annual team and individual contest.

pumac-algebra.contest_name_long: Algebra subject test (Division A) at PUMaC
pumac-algebra.description: Algebra subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.

pumac-b-algebra.contest_name_long: Algebra subject test (Division B) at PUMaC
pumac-b-algebra.description: Algebra subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.

pumac-combinator.contest_name_long: Combinatorics subject test (Division A) at PUMaC
pumac-combinator.description: Combinatorics subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.

pumac-geometry.contest_name_long: Geometry subject test (Division A) at PUMaC
pumac-geometry.description: Geometry subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.

pumac-b-geometry.contest_name_long: Geometry subject test (Division B) at PUMaC
pumac-b-geometry.description: Geometry subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.

pumac-number-theory.contest_name_long: Number Theory subject test (Division A) at PUMaC
pumac-number-theory.description: Number Theory subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.

pumac-b-combinator.contest_name_long: Combinatorics subject test (Division B) at PUMaC
pumac-b-combinator.description: Combinatorics subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.

pumac-b-number-theory.contest_name_long: Number Theory subject test (Division B) at PUMaC
pumac-b-number-theory.description: Number Theory subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.

mathcounts-national-rank.contest_name_long: National-level rankings for the MATHCOUNTS competition
mathcounts-national-rank.description: National-level rankings for the MATHCOUNTS competition series.

cmimc.contest_name_long: Carnegie Mellon Informatics and Mathematics Competition
cmimc.description: Carnegie Mellon Informatics and Mathematics Competition. Annual contest at CMU with individual and team rounds.

cmimc-algebra.contest_name_long: Algebra and Number Theory subject test at CMIMC
cmimc-algebra.description: Algebra and Number Theory subject test at CMIMC.

cmimc-comb.contest_name_long: Combinatorics and Computer Science subject test at CMIMC
cmimc-comb.description: Combinatorics and Computer Science subject test at CMIMC.

arml.description: American Regions Mathematics League. Regional team competition with power and individual rounds.

dmm.description: Duke Math Meet. Annual mathematics competition at Duke University with individual and team rounds.

cmm.description: Caltech Math Meet. Annual mathematics competition at Caltech with individual rankings.

mpfg.description: Math Prize for Girls. Annual competition at MIT by Advantage Testing Foundation for top female high school mathematicians.

mpfg-olympiad.contest_name_long: Olympiad competition by Advantage Testing Foundation for top female high school mathematicians, with Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals
mpfg-olympiad.description: Olympiad competition by Advantage Testing Foundation for top female high school mathematicians, with Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals.

mmaths.contest_name_long: Math Majors of America Tournament for High Schools
mmaths.description: Math Majors of America Tournament for High Schools. Team-based contest at multiple university sites, run by undergraduate math students.

bmt.description: Berkeley Math Tournament. Annual competition at UC Berkeley with individual and team rounds.

bmt-algebra.contest_name_long: Algebra subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament
bmt-algebra.description: Algebra subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.

bmt-calculus.contest_name_long: Calculus subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament
bmt-calculus.description: Calculus subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.

bmt-discrete.contest_name_long: Discrete mathematics subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament
bmt-discrete.description: Discrete mathematics subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.

bmt-geometry.contest_name_long: Geometry subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament
bmt-geometry.description: Geometry subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.

bamo-8.contest_name_long: Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, middle school division
bamo-8.description: Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, middle school division. Annual proof-based contest for students in the Bay Area.

bamo-12.contest_name_long: Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, high school division
bamo-12.description: Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, high school division. Annual proof-based contest for students in the Bay Area.

mk-national.contest_name_long: Math Kangaroo USA national-level winners by grade (record only; not shown on website, no MCP)
mk-national.description: Math Kangaroo USA national-level winners by grade (record only; not shown on website, no MCP).

brumo-a.contest_name_long: Brown University Math Olympiad Division A
brumo-a.description: Brown University Math Olympiad Division A. Individual rankings from the annual competition at Brown University.
